reference: SO THE BRAHMAN AND THE TIGER WALKED ON TILL THEY CAME TO A BANYAN TREE AND THE BRAHMAN SAID TO IT BANYAN TREE BANYAN TREE HEAR AND GIVE JUDGMENT
text: So the Brahmin and the tiger walked on till they came to a banyan tree, and the Brahmin said to it, "Banyan tree, banyan tree, hear and give judgment."
